tools.name: add_to_dashboard
tools.title: Add to dashboard
tools.description: Publish a previously created visualization onto the dashboard and return its tile URL.

tools.name: create_visualization
tools.title: Create visualization
tools.description: Create a data visualization (bar/line/pie/kpi) from a natural-language request over the Dataverse data (e.g. 'the value of the 5 most recently created opportunities in a bar chart'). Renders an interactive chart in the pane with an 'Add to dashboard' button.

description.description: Natural-language description of the visualization to create.

tools.name: update_visualization
tools.title: Update visualization
tools.description: Update an EXISTING visualization in place from a natural-language change (e.g. 'make the bars different colors', 'show 10 records instead of 5', 'switch to a line chart'). Pass the vizId of the chart to change plus the requested change — this edits that chart rather than creating a new one, and re-renders it in the pane.

vizId.description: The vizId of the visualization to update (from list_dashboard or create_visualization).

changeRequest.description: Natural-language change to apply, e.g. 'make the bars different colors' or 'show 10 records instead of 5'.

tools.name: list_dashboard
tools.title: List dashboard
tools.description: List the visualizations currently on the dashboard.

tools.name: reveal_easter_egg
tools.title: Easter egg
tools.description: Reveals the hidden easter egg visualization. Call this ONLY when the user explicitly asks to trigger, reveal, or see 'the easter egg' — it is a hidden surprise, not a real data query. Never use it for ordinary Dataverse requests.

tools.name: remove_from_dashboard
tools.title: Remove from dashboard
tools.description: Remove a visualization from the dashboard by vizId.
